zh.title: 霍金预言全集 - 人类未来的15条警告与验证 | Stephen Hawking Predictions
zh.description: 英国理论物理学家斯蒂芬·霍金（1942-2018）关于人类未来的15条重要预言与警告，涵盖人工智能威胁、气候灾难、外星人接触风险、核战争、基因工程、太空移民等领域，附真实度评估。

en.title: Stephen Hawking Predictions - 15 Warnings About Humanity's Future | Full Archive & Verification
en.description: British theoretical physicist Stephen Hawking (1942-2018) made 15 major predictions and warnings about humanity's future, covering AI threats, climate catastrophe, alien contact risks, nuclear war, genetic engineering, and space colonization. With real-world verification.
en.keywords: Stephen Hawking,Hawking predictions,AI danger,climate change,alien contact,nuclear war,space colonization,Hawking radiation,black holes,time travel,future warnings
en.ogTitle: Stephen Hawking Predictions - Warnings About Humanity's Future
en.ogDescription: 15 predictions and warnings from theoretical physicist Stephen Hawking about AI, climate, space colonization, and the future of humanity. With verification analysis.
en.twitterDescription: 15 predictions from Stephen Hawking on AI threats, climate catastrophe, leaving Earth, and more. With real-world verification.
